title: hedypnois polymorpha subsp. rhagadioloides
intro: Hedypnois polymorpha subsp. rhagadioloides, commonly known as the rough-hair hedge bedstraw, is a subspecies of the Hedypnois polymorpha plant, belonging to the family Rosaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues. Hedypnois polymorpha subsp. rhagadioloides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
